headline: Jack Dorsey Says AI Models' Progress, Push Toward Functionalization Spurred Block's Mega Job Cuts - Stock Surges 23% After-Hours
summary: Block, Inc. (NYSE:XYZ) CEO Jack Dorsey said Thursday that advancements in artificial intelligence models and efforts to streamline operations drove the company’s choice to lay off nearly half its workforce. headline: Block (SQ) Is Up 19.7% After Massive AI-Led Restructuring And 40% Workforce Cut – What's Changed
summary: In late February 2026, Block, Inc. reported full-year 2025 results showing revenue of US$24.19 billion and net income of US$1.31 billion, alongside plans to cut more than 40% of its workforce as part of a large restructuring tied to artificial intelligence tools. The company expects US$450 million to US$500 million in restructuring charges as it moves toward a smaller, AI-centric operating model that management says is driven by productivity gains rather than financial distress. We’ll now...
